summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 28/07/2023
DCE iron ore futures market falling trends, the main contract I2309 closed 834.5. an decrease of 2.68% throughout the day;Some traders adopt separate quotations. Some steel mills purchased on demand.
